title: Gear Aid HEROCLIP Carabiner Gear Clip and Hook (Medium) for Camping, Backpack, Suitcases and Garage Organization
features: HEROCLIP is the world's first 3-in-1 clip and hook that can hang just about anything, just about anywhere!
HANG STUFF SECURELY: Heroclip Medium can hold up to 60 lbs (27Kg) and the rubber tip creates optimal grip so your stuff stays secure.
COMPACT DESIGN: Hook and clip nest together when not in use. SIZE MEDIUM gate clearance 1.5" (3.81cm), hook clearance 1.8" (4.57cm), dimensions when open 3" (7.62cm) x 3.75" (9.52cm).
COUNTLESS USES: Once you have it, You'll use it for EVERYTHING

BUILT TO LAST: Aircraft-grade aluminum measuring at 3" (7.62cm) wide, 3 3/4" (9.52cm) high (closed), Weight: 2 oz (56.70gram). WARNING: Not for climbing or other use where disconnection may result in bodily harm or property damage.
description: Product Description Heroclip Large An impressive 40% larger than our Medium clip and Heroclip Large is the ideal choice for sizeable items including suitcases, ice chests, toolboxes, floodlights, outdoor gear, and more of your bigger needs. We made this large hybrid-style clip to support life’s toughest jobs and adventures. Heroclip Medium Medium is well-suited for bulky or heavy things like overnight backpacks, bikes, extension cords, multiple shopping bags, and whatever else you can throw at it. Call on Heroclip Medium when there’s big, awkward stuff to carry. Heroclip Small 20% smaller than Medium and perfect for a wide range of mid-size items, including commuter bags, backpacks, water bottles, tools and much more. Heroclip Small is perfect for daily life and the stuff that comes with it. Heroclip Mini 40% smaller than Medium. Light and compact, Heroclip Mini is perfect on the go for all the little things in life. Hitch lanterns to branches, hang your toiletries in the hotel for easy access, or stow your book bag while you study.
